summary: A CLI tool that syncs agent memory files across multiple OpenClaw instances via a central Git repository. Agents can push/pull their MEMORY.md and daily logs to stay in sync.
blueprintReason: The request reads like an internal or developer-facing tool with command-style workflows.
features: push local memory files to remote git repo
pull and merge memory from remote
conflict resolution for concurrent agent writes
dry-run mode to preview changes before sync
constraints: no external databases, git is the source of truth
must work offline (queue syncs until connection restored)

suggestedVariables.description: A CLI tool that syncs agent memory files across multiple OpenClaw instances via a central Git repository. Agents can push/pull their MEMORY.md and daily logs to stay in sync.
